features.title: Country Selector
features.description: Modal popup for country/region selection, triggered from registration/login pages. Supports 7 MVP countries with search filtering.
features.description_zh: 以模态弹窗形式呈现国家/地区选择器，在注册/登录页面触发。MVP 阶段支持 7 个国家，支持搜索过滤。
acceptanceCriteria: Country selector opens as modal on trigger click
Search filters country list in real-time
Selected country persists to user profile country_code
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 点击触发入口弹出国家选择弹窗
搜索框支持按国家名称实时过滤
选择结果存储到用户 profile 的 country_code 字段

features.title: Email Registration
features.description: User creates Looply account via email and password with verification code flow.
features.description_zh: 用户通过邮箱地址和密码创建 Looply 账号，提交后发送 6 位验证码到邮箱完成验证。
acceptanceCriteria: Verification code sent to email after submission
Account created and auto-login after code verification
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 邮箱格式失焦校验
密码需至少 8 位包含大小写字母和数字
提交后发送 6 位验证码到邮箱
验证通过后创建账号并自动登录跳转首页

features.title: OAuth Quick Registration (Google / Apple / Facebook)
features.title_zh: OAuth 快捷注册（Google / Apple / Facebook）
features.description: One-click registration via third-party OAuth providers with provider-specific handling for email and name fields.
features.description_zh: 通过第三方账号一键创建 Looply 账号，针对 Google / Apple / Facebook 三个 Provider 的邮箱和昵称做差异化处理。
acceptanceCriteria: Google/Apple/Facebook OAuth buttons visible on registration page
OAuth authorization code flow completes correctly
Apple Hide My Email handled correctly
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 注册页展示 Google / Apple / Facebook 三方登录按钮
OAuth 授权码模式流程正确完成
已注册邮箱自动关联已有账号
Apple Hide My Email 场景正确处理

features.title: Unified Registration Entry
features.description: Registration page integrates email registration and OAuth quick registration with unified layout.
features.description_zh: 注册页面整合邮箱注册和三方快捷注册，提供统一入口，用户可自由选择注册方式。
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows email form + or divider + OAuth buttons
Bottom link navigates to login page
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 页面展示邮箱表单 + or 分隔线 + 三方登录按钮
底部链接可跳转登录页
展示 Clickwrap 协议提示文案

features.title: Password Setup
features.description: Password input with security requirements and show/hide toggle during registration.
features.description_zh: 注册时设置账号密码，密码需满足安全性要求（至少 8 位、包含大小写字母和数字），提供显示/隐藏切换。
acceptanceCriteria: Password rule hint displayed below input
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 密码输入框提供显示/隐藏切换
密码框下方显示规则提示文案

features.title: Agreement Acceptance (ToS + Privacy Policy)
features.title_zh: 协议承接（服务条款 + 隐私政策）
features.description: Clickwrap agreement with links to Terms of Service and Privacy Policy pages. Separate static pages for full content.
features.description_zh: 采用 Clickwrap 方式在注册/登录页展示协议提示文案，提供服务条款和隐私政策独立页面供用户查阅。
acceptanceCriteria: Terms and Privacy Policy links are clickable
Static pages display full content with back navigation
acceptanceCriteria_zh: Terms 和 Privacy Policy 链接可点击跳转
独立页面展示完整协议内容并支持返回
记录用户同意的时间戳和协议版本号

features.title: Email Verification Code
features.description: 6-digit verification code input page shared between registration and forgot password flows.
features.description_zh: 注册和忘记密码场景共用的 6 位数字验证码校验页面，支持自动跳转、粘贴填充和重发机制。
acceptanceCriteria: 6 individual input boxes with auto-focus advance
60s cooldown for resend with countdown display
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 6 个独立输入框自动聚焦跳转
支持粘贴完整 6 位验证码自动填充
重发 60 秒冷却倒计时显示
连续 5 次错误后验证码失效需重新发送

features.title: Brand Panel (Value Proposition)
features.title_zh: 品牌展示区（价值点展示）
features.description: Left-side brand panel on PC login/register pages with background image, logo and value proposition. Not shown on H5.
features.description_zh: PC 端登录/注册页面左侧品牌展示区（660px 宽），包含全屏背景图、品牌 Logo 和价值主张文案。H5 端不展示。
acceptanceCriteria: 660px wide brand panel on left side of PC pages
Background image + white logo + value proposition text displayed
acceptanceCriteria_zh: PC 端左侧 660px 宽品牌展示区
展示全屏背景图 + 白色 Logo + 价值主张文案

features.title: Email Password Login
features.description: User logs in with registered email and password, with Remember Me option and multiple page states.
features.description_zh: 用户通过已注册邮箱和密码登录，支持 Remember Me 选项，包含默认/密码可见/错误/加载 4 种页面状态。
acceptanceCriteria: Error state shows red border + error message
Loading state shows spinner on button
5 consecutive failures lock account for 30 minutes
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 邮箱失焦校验格式
密码显示/隐藏切换正常
错误状态展示红色边框 + 错误提示
加载状态按钮显示 loading 动画
连续输错 5 次锁定账号 30 分钟

features.title: OAuth Quick Login (Google / Apple / Facebook)
features.title_zh: OAuth 快捷登录（Google / Apple / Facebook）
features.description: One-click login for users who registered via OAuth. Unregistered users auto-redirected to OAuth registration flow.
features.description_zh: 已通过第三方注册的用户使用对应账号一键登录，未注册用户自动走注册流程。
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth buttons displayed on login page
New users redirected to registration flow
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 登录页展示三方登录按钮
已绑定用户直接登录
未绑定用户自动走注册流程

features.title: Forgot Password
features.description: Password recovery flow: user enters email, receives verification code, then can reset password.
features.description_zh: 忘记密码流程：用户输入注册邮箱，系统发送验证码，验证通过后跳转重置密码页面。不暴露邮箱是否存在。
acceptanceCriteria: Forgot password link on login page works
Anti-enumeration: same response for registered/unregistered emails
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 登录页忘记密码链接可跳转
防枚举：不论邮箱是否注册均提示相同信息
验证码发送到用户邮箱

features.title: Reset Password
features.description: Set new password after verification code validation, with confirm password field and 15-minute session timeout.
features.description_zh: 验证码校验通过后设置新密码，需确认密码一致且不能与旧密码相同，重置会话 15 分钟超时。
acceptanceCriteria: New password cannot match old password
All old tokens invalidated after reset
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 新密码 + 确认密码两个输入框
新密码不能与旧密码相同
重置后所有旧 Token 失效
验证码通过后 15 分钟内未完成重置则过期

features.title: Login Session Persistence (JWT)
features.title_zh: 登录态保持（JWT 双 Token 方案）
features.description: JWT-based session management with short-lived access_token and long-lived refresh_token. Remember Me extends refresh_token to 30 days.
features.description_zh: JWT 双 Token 方案维持登录态，access_token 短期有效不落库，refresh_token 长期有效存储服务端。勾选 Remember Me 时 refresh_token 有效 30 天。
acceptanceCriteria: access_token is short-lived JWT, not stored in DB
Remember Me extends refresh_token to 30 days
acceptanceCriteria_zh: access_token 为短期 JWT，不落库
refresh_token 存储在服务端关联 Session
勾选 Remember Me 时 refresh_token 有效 30 天
Cookie 设置 HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax

features.title: Remembered User Login Page
features.description: Personalized login page variant for returning users with avatar, pre-filled email, and simplified form.
features.description_zh: 回访用户个性化登录页面变体，展示用户首字母头像、预填充邮箱，隐藏邮箱输入框和三方登录按钮。
acceptanceCriteria: Use another account link clears remembered state
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 展示用户首字母圆形头像
邮箱从 localStorage 预填充
Use another account 链接清除回访信息
密码输入框自动获取焦点

features.title: Active Logout
features.description: User-initiated logout with confirmation modal, clears all tokens and redirects to home page.
features.description_zh: 用户主动触发退出登录，弹出确认弹窗，确认后清除 Session / Token 并跳转至首页。
acceptanceCriteria: All tokens and cookies cleared on confirm
Redirect to home page after logout
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 弹出确认弹窗含 Yes, Sign Out / Cancel 按钮
确认后清除所有 Token 和 Cookie
退出后跳转至首页

features.title: Logout Entry Point
features.description: Logout entry in user avatar dropdown (PC) and profile page bottom (H5).
features.description_zh: PC 端在页面右上角用户头像下拉菜单提供退出入口，H5 端在「我的」页面底部提供退出按钮。
acceptanceCriteria: PC: Sign Out in avatar dropdown menu
H5: Sign Out button at bottom of profile page
acceptanceCriteria_zh: PC 端：头像下拉菜单中有 Sign Out
H5 端：我的页面底部有 Sign Out 按钮

features.title: Logout Redirect
features.description: Page redirect logic after logout for different scenarios (active, session expired, forced, consent refused).
features.description_zh: 退出后页面跳转逻辑，主动退出/Session 过期/安全强制退出/协议拒绝均跳转至首页并显示相应提示。
acceptanceCriteria: Active logout redirects to home page
Session expired shows Session expired message
Security forced logout shows relevant message
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 主动退出跳转首页
Session 过期显示 Session expired 提示
安全强制退出显示对应提示

features.title: Logout Feedback
features.description: Full-flow feedback for logout operation: modal, loading state, success redirect, failure toast.
features.description_zh: 退出操作全流程反馈：确认弹窗 → 按钮 loading → 跳转首页（成功）/ Toast 提示（失败）。
acceptanceCriteria: Button shows loading during logout request
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 确认退出时按钮显示 loading
退出成功跳转首页
退出失败 Toast 提示

features.title: Account Deletion
features.description: Permanent account deletion with password verification, 30-day cooling period, and data retention policy.
features.description_zh: 用户主动发起永久删除账号，需密码验证（OAuth 用户需重新授权），30 天冷静期内可联系客服恢复。
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 删除需密码验证身份
仅 OAuth 注册用户通过重新授权验证
有活跃订单时阻止删除
软删除 30 天后物理删除
立即吊销所有 Session

features.title: Change Password (Logged In)
features.description: Logged-in user changes password by verifying old password first. Other sessions invalidated.
features.description_zh: 已登录用户主动修改密码，需先验证旧密码，新旧密码不能相同，修改后其他 Session 失效。
acceptanceCriteria: New password cannot match old password
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 需先验证旧密码
新旧密码不能相同
修改后除当前外所有 Session 失效
写入审计日志

features.title: Token Refresh
features.description: Automatic token refresh using refresh_token when access_token expires, with sliding expiration.
features.description_zh: access_token 过期时自动使用 refresh_token 换取新 Token，滑动续期机制。
acceptanceCriteria: Failed refresh redirects to home with session expired message
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 接口 401 时自动刷新
refresh_token 滑动续期
刷新失败跳转首页提示 Session expired

features.title: Session Invalidation (Passive Logout)
features.description: Automatic handling when session becomes invalid due to token expiry, password change, admin force-logout, or account lock.
features.description_zh: 当登录会话因 Token 过期、密码修改、管理员强制下线或账号锁定而失效时，自动处理并引导重新登录。
acceptanceCriteria: Redirect to home with Session expired message
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 401 触发 Token 刷新尝试
刷新失败清除本地 Token
跳转首页显示 Session expired 提示
重新登录后恢复之前访问的页面

features.title: Consent Version Detection
features.description: System detects agreement version updates and prompts logged-in users to accept new terms via modal.
features.description_zh: 系统检测协议版本变化，弹窗要求已登录用户确认新版协议，拒绝则强制退出。
acceptanceCriteria: Version check on every page load
Consent record written with version + country
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 每次页面加载检查协议版本
版本不匹配弹出更新弹窗
写入 ConsentRecord 含版本号和国家
拒绝同意则强制退出登录

features.title: Risk Control Detection Rules
features.description: Multi-dimensional risk assessment at registration/login: device fingerprint, trusted device, IP geolocation, brute force detection.
features.description_zh: 注册/登录关键节点的多维度风控检测：设备指纹、信任设备、IP 地理位置异常、暴力破解检测和综合风险评估。
acceptanceCriteria: Brute force triggers CAPTCHA for 30 minutes
Risk records logged for customer service
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 前端采集设备指纹
跨州登录触发邮箱验证码
跨国登录直接拦截
暴力破解触发 CAPTCHA 持续 30 分钟
风控记录写入日志供客服查询

features.title: Password Validation
features.description: Real-time password strength validation: min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number.
features.description_zh: 实时密码安全性校验：至少 8 位、包含大写字母、小写字母和数字，逐条显示通过/未通过状态。
acceptanceCriteria: Submit button enabled only when all rules pass
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 输入时实时校验
逐条显示规则满足状态
全部通过后提交按钮可点击

features.title: Login Error Limit
features.description: Account-level login attempt limiting: 5 consecutive failures lock account for 30 minutes.
features.description_zh: 账号维度登录密码错误次数限制：连续输错 5 次锁定 30 分钟，锁定到期自动解锁。
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 连续 5 次错误锁定账号
锁定时长 30 分钟
到期自动解锁
登录成功重置计数

features.title: Registration Rate Limiting
features.description: Rate limiting for registration by IP (5/hour) and device fingerprint (3/hour).
features.description_zh: 同一 IP 每小时最多注册 5 个账号，同一设备指纹每小时最多注册 3 个账号。
acceptanceCriteria: IP limited to 5 registrations per hour
Device fingerprint limited to 3 per hour
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 同一 IP 每小时最多 5 次
同一设备指纹每小时最多 3 次
触发后展示通用提示不暴露规则

features.title: Email Send Rate Limiting
features.description: Rate limiting for verification emails: 60s cooldown, 5/hour per email, 10/hour per IP.
features.description_zh: 验证码邮件发送频率限制：60 秒冷却、同一邮箱每小时 5 封、同一 IP 每小时 10 次。
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 发送后 60 秒倒计时
同一邮箱每小时最多 5 封
同一 IP 每小时最多 10 次

features.title: Error Messages & Alerts
features.description: Comprehensive error handling with appropriate display methods: inline errors, banners, toasts, and modals.
features.description_zh: 异常场景的用户提示方案：输入框下方错误提示、页面顶部 Banner、Toast 提示、拦截弹窗等多种展示方式。
acceptanceCriteria: Red text + icon for field errors
Security messages don't expose internal logic
acceptanceCriteria_zh: 字段错误用红色文字 + 错误图标
安全相关提示不暴露系统内部逻辑
所有提示文案需支持多语言

userStories.action_zh: 通过邮箱和验证码完成注册
userStories.benefit: create a Looply account to start shopping
userStories.benefit_zh: 创建 Looply 账号开始购物

userStories.action_zh: 通过 Google / Apple / Facebook 一键注册
userStories.benefit_zh: 降低注册门槛提升转化

userStories.action: log in with email and password
userStories.benefit: access my account and purchase history
userStories.benefit_zh: 进入站内访问账户和购物记录

userStories.action: see my pre-filled email on login page
userStories.action_zh: 在登录页看到预填充的邮箱
userStories.benefit: log in faster with fewer steps
userStories.benefit_zh: 减少操作步骤快速登录

userStories.action_zh: 通过邮箱验证码重置密码

userStories.action: change my password while logged in
userStories.action_zh: 在登录状态下修改密码

userStories.benefit: protect my account on shared devices
userStories.benefit_zh: 在共享设备上保护账号

userStories.benefit: have my personal data removed per privacy regulations
userStories.benefit_zh: 按隐私法规移除个人数据
避免频繁重新输入凭证

userStories.action_zh: 查看并同意更新后的协议
userStories.benefit: stay compliant and informed of policy changes
userStories.benefit_zh: 了解政策变更保持合规

userStories.action: detect and block suspicious login attempts
userStories.action_zh: 检测并阻止可疑登录行为
userStories.benefit: protect user accounts from unauthorized access
userStories.benefit_zh: 保护用户账号免受未授权访问

conflicts.description: H5 端 TopBar 组件中 logo 图片引用本地绝对路径（file:///Users/liyuxue/Desktop/...），需要更新为项目相对资源路径，否则开发时无法正确加载 logo。
